notes: What's New feed. Newest first. Each item: id (stable), date (YYYY-MM-DD), kind (new-session | new-module | prompt-of-week | live-class | announcement), and either {course,session,title} or {course,title} or just {title,body}.

items.title: Source verification trainer
items.body: Spot the AI hallucination — 20 real citations, some are fabricated. New mini-trainer in Research with AI.

items.title: AI Automation & Agents — opens next live class
items.body: Course 8 is being prepared. Six sessions covering Connectors, Skills, Scheduled Agents, Telegram bots, n8n, and a Capstone.

items.title: Prompt of the week — Armenian product photography
items.body: Open the Library and look for the new Beauty / Cosmetics flatlay prompt, locked to one shot recipe.

items.title: Next live class — Friday, Yerevan time
items.body: We will cover Brand Identity Session 4 + a live demo of NotebookLM. Bring a real client brief.
